    Method
    Description
    TestBeanStore
    JuneauBeanStoreExtension.getStore()
    Returns the current effective overlay — method-scope if a test method is executing, otherwise the class-scope overlay.
    <T> TestBeanStore
    TestBeanStore.override(Class<T> type, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Registers an unnamed supplier-backed bean as a test-time override.

    Registers a named supplier-backed bean as a test-time override.

    TestBeanStore.override(Class<T> type, T bean)
    Registers an unnamed bean as a test-time override.
    <T> TestBeanStore
    TestBeanStore.override(Class<T> type, T bean, String name)
    Registers a named bean as a test-time override.
    TestBeanStore
    JuneauBeanStoreExtension.OverrideSet.store()
    Returns the value of the store record component.

    Optional<TestBeanStore>
    JuneauBeanStoreExtension.getStore(Scope scope)
    Returns the overlay for the specified scope, if one is currently active.
